title: ドレスをまとう先にあるもの

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I've been waiting for you, my brilliant gemstones! ☆ You were the
only team that succeeded in solving all three riddles!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
First off, allow me to congratulate you. You've all done well to make
it here, using your intellect to overcome multiple hurdles.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
However! ♪ The audition isn't over just yet, remember? The time has
come for you all to propose to my racewear!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Racewear, I promised myself that I'd get my hands on you. So here I
am!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: ...That's it? Awfully straightforward, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah, if the cute Curren puts on cute racewear, then she'll
become the cutest in the universe! That's all there is to it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
That's some confidence you have there. But you've shown me
throughout today's audition that you can back it up with talent!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Your unwavering self-assurance is truly beautiful! Now let's see, next
up is...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Me! I'm Haru Urara, and my dream is to finish first in a race!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That's why I need you, racewear. Once I put you on, I'm sure I'll be all
sparkly and get a big boost of energy!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So racewear, please! Run with me, and we'll win lots and lots of races
together!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I see, so your goal is to finish first. I respect your passion for not only
fun, but also victory!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um... I've always admired the muses. Whenever they run, everyone
watching always breaks into smiles and laughter.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I want to make the crowd smile when I run, too. But I can't do it by
myself... so I want you to help me, racewear.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It's not only the spectators, either... I also want to make my friends
and everyone around me happy... So, please!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
That's a wonderful wish of yours. I know you're a kind and gentle soul
after watching you today.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Racewear serves as an Umamusume's armor on the track. And I've
heard that Ms. Beauty's works are not only beautiful, but top-class in
functionality to boot.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
My dream is to stand on the turf as an active racer for as long as I
possibly can. That's why you're the perfect companion for me!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
...It's not every day I hear someone praise my wedding dresses for
their functionality.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I believe that the beauty of optimization isn't inferior to any other
type of beauty. Please protect me, so I can keep on running.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm touched by how much you believe in my dresses! ♪ What a lovely
proposal!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: ...All right, I believe we have one proposal left?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
First, I wish to thank you for giving me the opportunity to enter this
audition, Ms. Beauty.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Second, allow me to apologize. When I originally expressed my intent
to enter the audition, it was not out of a desire to obtain your
racewear.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Captain? Upon discovering everyone's aspirations, I have determined
it my duty to help them realize those ambitions. As such, may I have
your permission to join them?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
In truth... I simply felt a burning desire to discover why everyone else
longed for the racewear you designed.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yet as I went through the audition, I learned that each of my friends
had projected their own ideals onto your racewear.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Urara's ideal was pure and genuine—to run alongside her friends, and
win.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Rice's ideal was altruistic—to make everyone around her smile with
joy. And true to that belief, she never hesitated in extending a
helping hand.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno's ideal was practical—to prolong her racing career for as long as
possible. Something we Umamusume all dream of, perhaps.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And last but not least, Curren's ideal was simple, but steadfast—to
fully express as her cute self.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Well, it's because I want the cutest racewear ever.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
All of them wished to give shape to their ideals. And they trusted in
Ms. Beauty's racewear to do just that.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Proudly wearing a physical representation of your ideals is akin to
declaring your determination to realize them. The peoples' reaction
becomes a source of motivation.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Upon understanding this, a new fire was lit within me. Now I too, wish
to adorn myself in my ideals.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I aspire to devote myself to my people and work for their cause. Thus,
I ask for your favor, racewear... that I may never forget to blaze new
paths forward.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I doubt I can fully imagine the burden of the responsibilities you
shoulder... but your passion is simply beautiful!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well then, I think it's about time I announce the results of today's
audition! ☆ Curren Chan, Fine Motion, Ikuno Dictus...

text_block_list.name: All Three
text_block_list.text: Yes?!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Rice Shower, and Haru Urara...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Uuugh...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What's wrong, Rice?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
N-no, it's nothing. I was just thinking, wasn't this audition supposed to
judge us on our intellect?

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
The theme is, "Those who strive for beauty must also possess
intellect"! I eagerly await the participation of undiscovered
diamonds! ♪

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I... wasn't much help in solving the riddles...

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Oh my, oh my, what's this about? Who said that the muse candidates would be judged only by intellect?

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
"Those who strive for beauty must also possess intellect!" But at the
same time, "Possessing intellect doesn't equate to beauty!"

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Inspiration, friendship, devotion, and passion—you all have shown me
the pinnacle of beauty!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, I'm absolutely flowing with inspiration right now! So
much so that I want to rush straight back to my desk and get to work!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Does that mean I'm included, too?

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Ahem! Without any further ado, I will now announce the results of the
audition.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: All five of you passed! And with flying colors!
